description_for_human: Free embeddable time zone converter widgets showing live clocks and hour conversion for 40 timezone pairs.
description_for_model: TimeHopper provides free, embeddable time zone converter widgets. Each widget displays live clocks for two time zones and an interactive hour converter. Available as iframe embeds with auto-resizing. Use the widget directory at /oembed.json to discover all 20 available timezone pairs. Each pair has an embed URL (/embed/{slug}.html) and an oEmbed endpoint (/oembed/{slug}.json). Widgets handle DST automatically via the browser Intl API. No API key required. Example pairs: pst-to-est, utc-to-est, gmt-to-est, ist-to-pst, jst-to-est.
